facts.shortSummary: At the Leviathan, Wazir shares The Ciphered Scroll and the party connects Hamri's recent deaths to Gazankoa, Airion, Nimessa, and the stolen Sentient Ocean.
facts.longSummary: The party gathers at the Leviathan while Wazir walks through The Ciphered Scroll: its author sought to restore his dead wife Nadine, sacrificed people whose bodies filled with water, chased legends of Airion the Mistspeaker, found a ring tied to Nimessa, and came to Hamri after calling on Gazankoa. The group debates resurrection, gatza visions, Medin, Airion's ruined tower in the North Cliffs above the sea cave, and the living water before deciding to rest and search the tower in the morning.

location.context: the Leviathan Inn, where the party compares notes over Wazir's translation
location.notes: The opening discussion stays at the inn and ends with the group resting before the morning search.

npcs.name: Azar the Lost
npcs.notes: His account drives the investigation into the recent deaths and the strange water.

npcs.name: Gazankoa
npcs.context: voice or power named in the scroll
npcs.notes: The party treats Gazankoa as the force behind the scroll author's visions and sacrifices.

npcs.name: Nadine
npcs.notes: Azar's desire to bring her back is the emotional center of the scroll.

npcs.name: Nimessa
npcs.notes: The scroll says she was compelled to steal the Sentient Ocean.

npcs.name: Airion
npcs.notes: Airion's tower, ring, and water magic become the party's next investigative thread.

npcs.name: Medin
npcs.context: place or term named in the scroll
npcs.notes: Wazir flags Medin as part of the scroll's chain of clues.

items.name: The Ciphered Scroll
items.notes: Wazir has translated it and reads its contents to the party.

items.name: Sentient Ocean
items.notes: The recovered living water appears to be the object Azar wanted Nimessa to steal.

items.name: Airion's ring
items.notes: The scroll links the ring to summoning or commanding Nimessa.

facts.shortSummary: The party searches Airion's ruined tower in the North Cliffs, finds signs of recent occupation, and confirms that an old watery illusion still clings to the site.
facts.longSummary: The next morning the group reaches Airion's ruined tower in the North Cliffs, above the sea cave, and discovers that a newer watchtower shell sits on much older stonework. Inside, the place throws them into a convincing Plane of Water illusion with dolphins, black-water tendrils, and Airion's water-commanding incantation before the image fades back to the shallow flooded chamber; the evidence of recent habitation sends them back toward town informants.

location.context: Airion's ruined tower above the sea cave
location.notes: The beat stays focused on the tower, its older foundation, and the lingering water magic within.

npcs.name: Airion
npcs.context: former owner or source of the tower's old magic
npcs.notes: His name appears in the incantation tied to the water illusion.

npcs.name: recent tower occupant
npcs.context: unidentified person who had been living in the tower
npcs.notes: The party finds signs that someone has used the ruin in recent weeks.

items.name: Ring of Water Walking
items.notes: Kaleho uses the ring while testing the tower's water illusion.

items.name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
items.notes: Wazir offers it as a practical response to Trok being in real water beneath the illusion.

facts.shortSummary: The party fans out across Hamri and learns that a haggard old man has been using the tower, smoking gatza, and asking questions about lead.
facts.longSummary: After leaving the tower, Ryu and Trok go to Jaeson while the others check Samar, Reliah, and Orden for local gossip. The combined reports point to a worn older man who appeared only recently, hid signs of living in the tower, left fish remains and the smell of gatza, had ties to the Drowned Flats deaths, and had been asking around about lead before the group prepares to reconvene at the market.

location.context: split inquiries around the north face, the Drowned Flats, and the docks
location.notes: The party moves between local informants but stays within Hamri.

npcs.name: Jaeson
npcs.notes: He saw signs of someone using the tower recently.

npcs.name: Samar
npcs.context: orphan informant in the Drowned Flats
npcs.notes: She helps confirm local rumors around the recent deaths and the stranger's movements.

npcs.name: Reliah
npcs.context: orphan informant in the Drowned Flats
npcs.notes: She adds neighborhood detail from the same poor quarter hit by the disappearances.

npcs.name: Orden
npcs.notes: He contributes what he knows about the strange boat and waterfront movements.

npcs.name: haggard old man
npcs.notes: The informants' reports are later understood to point to Azar.

items.name: gatza
items.notes: The tower and the old man's behavior are repeatedly connected to gatza use.

items.name: lead
items.notes: The party learns that the suspect was asking about lead before commissioning the box.

facts.shortSummary: At the market and in afternoon errands, the party gets Benat's history of Airion, Ovina's lead-box confession, and Sofi's curt message about strange ships.
facts.longSummary: The party regroups at the fish market after lunch, compares the morning's clues, and presses Benat for the older story of Airion's tower, Hamri's hidden weak spots, and the living water. They split again: Kaleho and Trok persuade Ovina to show the nearly finished lead-lined box and the dismantled gold-and-sapphire ring Azar paid with, while Wazir and Ryu climb to Glitter Cliff and receive only a formal message that Sofi knows of no strange ship and wants any sightings reported for fees and duties.

location.context: the fish market, Ovina's smithy near Shark's Dock, and Sofi's house on Glitter Cliff
location.notes: The beat condenses the market regroup and two parallel afternoon leads.

npcs.name: Benat
npcs.context: lizardfolk liaison and teller of local history
npcs.notes: He explains Airion's old tower and Hamri's deeper magical context.

npcs.name: Ovina
npcs.notes: She admits that the old man paid her to make a sealed lead-lined box.

npcs.name: Sofi
npcs.context: wealthy shipbuilding magnate on Glitter Cliff
npcs.notes: She declines to meet directly and sends a polished message through her household.

npcs.name: Sofi's servant
npcs.notes: He carries Sofi's reply to Wazir and Ryu.

npcs.name: Azar the Lost
npcs.notes: The party increasingly treats him as the man behind the scroll and the box commission.

npcs.name: Airion
npcs.context: ancient wizard tied to Hamri's old tower lore
npcs.notes: Benat's account deepens the party's sense of Airion's importance.

items.name: lead-lined box
items.notes: Ovina shows the sealed box Azar ordered, sized slightly larger than a breadbox.

items.name: gold ring with sapphires
items.notes: Azar paid Ovina with the ring, which she has taken apart.

items.name: phantom boat
items.notes: The strange ship remains the subject of the inquiry at Glitter Cliff and Shark's Dock.

facts.shortSummary: The party consolidates the clues at Shark's Dock, consults Yaz about the living ocean, and rests after settling on a cautious dawn interception plan.
facts.longSummary: Regathered at Shark's Dock in late afternoon, the group fits together the phantom boat, the lead-lined box, the Blood Knife, Gazankoa, Nimessa, Airion's ring, and Azar's need for the Sentient Ocean. Wazir confirms that Ovina's ring is no longer magical and tests the box, then Ryu and Trok speak with Yaz after dark about the western living ocean and the Splinters; back at the Leviathan, the party agrees to let one person approach Azar in the morning while the others hide nearby and prepare to stop him if the Blood Knife or its bearer turns violent.

location.context: Shark's Dock, Yaz's tower, and the Leviathan Inn
location.notes: The beat begins with a late-afternoon regroup, includes the evening visit to Yaz, and ends with the night plan before rest.

npcs.name: Yaz
npcs.notes: His lore about the living ocean helps the party interpret the Sentient Ocean.

npcs.name: Ovina
npcs.context: smith holding the ring and box
npcs.notes: Wazir inspects the ring and lead-lined box at her shop.

npcs.name: Azar the Lost
npcs.notes: The group expects him to return for the finished box.

npcs.name: Gazankoa
npcs.context: suspected voice behind the Blood Knife
npcs.notes: Wazir argues that Gazankoa is the real danger behind Azar's actions.

npcs.name: Nimessa
npcs.context: marid tied to the theft of the Sentient Ocean
npcs.notes: The party reasons that she was compelled and angered by the ring.

npcs.name: Airion
npcs.context: owner of the ring and water lore
npcs.notes: The ring and Hamri's weak points keep pointing back to Airion.

items.name: lead-lined box
items.notes: The box becomes the centerpiece of the plan to contain the Blood Knife and catch Azar.

items.name: gold ring with sapphires
items.notes: Wazir finds no active magic in it, though the party suspects it was once Airion's ring.

items.name: Blood Knife
items.notes: The party suspects the Blood Knife is carrying Gazankoa's influence.

items.name: Sentient Ocean
items.notes: The living water remains the motive for Azar's ritual and Nimessa's theft.

items.name: phantom boat
items.notes: The party expects Azar to use it when he comes for the box.

facts.shortSummary: At dawn, the party spots Azar's phantom boat, confronts him after he collects the box, and sees the parley turn into an imminent fight.
facts.longSummary: The next morning the party stages itself around Shark's Dock after Blue spots a fast ship rounding the point. Azar arrives in oilskin cloaks, collects the lead-lined box from Ovina, and tries to leave; Ryu blocks him with questions about the tower, the deaths, and the Sentient Ocean while invisible Wazir uses Nadine's name to unsettle him, and the old man admits he is Azar and that Gazankoa is helping him save his family before a clearly nefarious invitation onto the boat makes the party draw weapons.

location.context: Shark's Dock outside Ovina's shop and beside Azar's phantom boat
location.notes: The beat covers the dawn stakeout and failed parley before initiative resolves into active combat.

npcs.name: Azar the Lost
npcs.context: old man trying to reach his boat with the box
npcs.notes: He identifies himself, insists he is trying to save his family, and becomes openly hostile when stopped.

npcs.name: Ovina
npcs.context: smith who opens early for the box handoff
npcs.notes: Azar collects the finished box from her shop.

npcs.name: Nadine
npcs.notes: Wazir uses her name in a whispered magical message to shake Azar.

npcs.name: Gazankoa
npcs.context: power Azar says is helping him
npcs.notes: Azar says Gazankoa can bring back the lost dead.

npcs.name: drowned servant
npcs.notes: A figure is present on the boat before the combat reveals it clearly.

items.name: lead-lined box
items.notes: Azar carries it under one arm as he leaves Ovina's shop.

items.name: phantom boat
items.notes: The boat is hard to keep in sight and sits ready at Shark's Dock.

items.name: Sentient Ocean
items.notes: Ryu presses Azar about the living water during the attempted conversation.

items.name: Blood Knife
items.notes: Ryu asks whether the Blood Knife is speaking to Azar.

facts.shortSummary: Azar erupts into black tentacles, runs for the phantom boat, and punishes the party's first attempts to restrain him.
facts.longSummary: As the party attacks, Azar throws black tentacles across the dock, takes spear and melee hits, and bolts for the phantom boat while his drowned servant rises from the vessel dripping seawater. Trok drags Azar into the water and Kaleho lands a hard crossbow shot, but Azar's defenses and whispers keep him dangerous; the box is dropped in the boat, the vessel is pushed away, the tentacles keep crushing Ryu and Wazir, and Trok's huge underwater assault is answered by Armor of Agathys cold that knocks him unconscious.

location.context: Shark's Dock, the water beside it, and Azar's phantom boat
location.notes: The fight moves between the dock, the boat, and the water.

npcs.name: Azar the Lost
npcs.notes: He casts black tentacles, keeps concentration through repeated hits, and uses cold armor and whispers to punish the party.

npcs.name: drowned servant
npcs.notes: It rises from the boat and joins the fight against Wazir and the others.

items.name: lead-lined box
items.notes: Azar drops it in the bottom of the phantom boat during the fight.

items.name: phantom boat
items.notes: The party tries to keep Azar from escaping on it and eventually pushes it away from the dock.

mainEnemies.name: Azar the Lost
mainEnemies.notes: Primary hostile spellcaster trying to escape with the box.

mainEnemies.name: drowned servant
mainEnemies.notes: Waterlogged undead ally supporting Azar from the boat and dock.

combat.notes: The dock fight begins after the failed parley and escalates across the dock, water, and phantom boat.

facts.shortSummary: The fight turns after Trok is revived, breaks Azar's concentration, drops him unconscious, and leaves Kaleho to finish the drowned servant.
facts.longSummary: With Trok unconscious in the water and Ryu restrained, the party scrambles to recover: Ryu's healing spirit brings Trok back up, Wazir's shatter destroys Azar's cold armor, and Azar answers with lightning that kills a nearby townsfolk and batters Ryu and Kaleho. Trok heals himself, lashes out with Eldritch Maul crocodile strikes, finally breaks the tentacles, and knocks Azar unconscious; Kaleho then shoots the remaining drowned servant down so Wazir can rush to heal Azar before he dies.

location.context: Shark's Dock and the adjacent water
location.notes: This beat continues the same dockside combat through its resolution.

npcs.name: Azar the Lost
npcs.notes: He keeps fighting after leaving the water, but Trok's final barrage drops him unconscious.

npcs.name: drowned servant
npcs.notes: Kaleho kills it after Azar falls.

npcs.name: townsfolk bystander
npcs.notes: Azar's lightning blast kills one bystander during the fight.

items.name: healing spirit
items.notes: Ryu uses it to revive Trok before losing concentration.

items.name: Eldritch Maul tattoo
items.notes: Trok uses it to strike Azar from the water and end the fight.

items.name: lead-lined box
items.notes: It remains secured away on the boat while the combat resolves.

mainEnemies.name: Azar the Lost
mainEnemies.notes: The fight resolves when Trok knocks him unconscious.

mainEnemies.name: drowned servant
mainEnemies.notes: Kaleho finishes the servant after Azar falls.

combat.notes: This beat covers the crisis, recovery, and end of the dockside combat.

facts.shortSummary: After the fight, the party stabilizes Azar, hears his full tale, clears his lair, identifies the recovered items, and sees him leave with Benat several days later.
facts.longSummary: The aftermath spans several days: Wazir heals Azar and the party binds him, recovers from injuries, calms Shark's Dock, tends the woman killed by Azar's lightning, and hears Azar's full tale. That evening they search the Splinters, dispatch two drowned zombies, find Sefa dead, recover Airion's annotated books, lock the Blood Knife in the lead-lined box, collect the brass bowl and restitution coins, and on Aug 6 Wazir identifies the strange knife and the bowl of commanding water elementals before Azar leaves south with Benat on Aug 9 to heal and make amends.

location.context: Shark's Dock, Azar's lair in the Splinters, and the following days around town
location.notes: The beat starts at the dock after combat and compresses the narrated multi-day aftermath through 1747-08-09.

npcs.name: Azar the Lost
npcs.notes: He explains the murders, gives up the lair, and later leaves with Benat.

npcs.name: Sefa
npcs.notes: She was a poor older gatza addict who lived alone in the Drowned Flats.

npcs.name: drowned zombies
npcs.notes: Two more drowned zombies are quickly dispatched during the expedition to the Splinters.

npcs.name: Nadine
npcs.notes: Azar's failed ritual was meant to bring her back.

npcs.name: Gazankoa
npcs.context: source of the Blood Knife's influence
npcs.notes: Azar says the voice gave him the Blood Knife and lied that the killings could restore his wife.

npcs.name: Nimessa
npcs.notes: She stole the Sentient Ocean but was angry about being forced into it.

npcs.name: Airion
npcs.context: wizard whose annotated books and ring guided Azar
npcs.notes: His lore led Azar toward the Sentient Ocean and Hamri's water-plane weak spots.

npcs.name: Benat
npcs.notes: Azar leaves with him for the lizardfolk village on 1747-08-09.

items.name: Blood Knife
items.notes: The party recovers it from Azar's lair and locks it in the lead-lined box.

items.name: lead-lined box
items.notes: The box silences the Blood Knife once the party stores it inside.

items.name: Airion's Notes
items.notes: The party recovers three older books from Airion's library, annotated with Airion's glosses; two are Drankorian works and one is Elvish.

items.name: brass bowl
items.notes: Wazir identifies it as a bowl of commanding water elementals that must be filled with fresh ocean water and used immediately.

items.name: scattered coins
items.notes: The recovered coins are paid as restitution to Sefa and the families of the dead who can be found.

items.name: Airion's ring
items.notes: It was a one-use magic item that allowed Azar to command Nimessa.

items.name: Sentient Ocean
items.notes: Azar wanted living water because he believed ordinary seawater was insufficient for the ritual.
